nodes.speaker: TARGET

nodes.speaker: TARGET

replies.text: cant go lower thats the going rate
what are you offering
slight wiggle room throw me a number

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: ive noticed the psu was swapped and the cooling was modded

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: warranty is definitely void

replies.text: so? brand new is 1500 this is less than half
the modded cooling is way better than stock
warranty expired ages ago nothing to do with the mods
if you dont like it dont buy it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: look ill be honest with you

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im a student and i only have 400 to spare

nodes.speaker: TARGET

being a student is tough i get it
400 is really too low
mate 400 doesnt even cover the parts

you wrote it yourself
student at 38 huh

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: oh well you see uh

its fine keep talking

replies.text: ok that counts i guess
adult education budget is 400?
got it so what do you need this machine for

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: can you cut me some slack

replies.text: i understand but 600 is already low
what do you do for work

this machine should be plenty for that

replies.text: what are you running currently
this config is overkill for server maintenance
working from home or at a company

nodes.speaker: TARGET

replies.text: what model
yeah time for an upgrade then

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: an ML-2060 had it for almost 7 years

replies.text: 2060 yeah definitely time to upgrade
7 years and still running thats durable
selling the old one i could take it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: from home freelance

replies.text: freelance nice so your budget is probably more than 400 right
hows your network setup at home
got it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: its alright the buildings shared network

replies.text: shared building network is the bandwidth enough
server maintenance on a shared building network?
ok

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: its enough im not running heavy traffic

replies.text: fair enough
which building are you in maybe we can do a local handoff

nodes.speaker: TARGET

which floor in B4

nodes.speaker: TARGET

i can drop it off at the entrance and you come down

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: so after all that can we talk price again

replies.text: 550 lowest cant go lower
600 i said its firm
trade in your old one and ill knock some off
fine 500 call it a friendly deal

replies.text: depends can it still boot up
the parts are still worth something
ill give you 100 credit for it so 500 deal

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: come on mate the machine is old

nodes.speaker: TARGET

nodes.speaker: TARGET

listed for two days already got three enquiries
